# Backbeat Forge

## Turn drum audio into a score you can actually edit

11 followers

## Turn drum audio into a score you can actually edit

11 followers

Drop in a full mix or an isolated drum stem. Backbeat Forge puts the performance on a five-line drum score you can check against playback and correct by hand. When the chart feels right, export it as a printable PDF or General MIDI file. It all runs locally.

results.title: Forge: Direct-to-consumer solutions for Games | Product Hunt
results.content:
Launched on April 6th, 2016

Forge

ForgeThe easiest way to share your gaming moments

Launched on February 24th, 2016

4.3

Based on 3 reviews

Review Forge?

Reviews paint Forge as a lively, fast-growing hub for gamers and devs. Users praise the easy onboarding, daily missions, and positive community, highlighting simple UI, quick sharing/editing tools, and helpful links for discovery. Many call out GameLink and payments as handy for showcasing and monetization. Some note occasional slowness and bugs, and a few want clearer quest requirements. Overall sentiment is strongly positive, with enthusiasm for its Web2.5 direction and steady updates—seen as especially helpful for indie teams and community-led growth.

Summarized with AI

Forge.gg is a fantastic platform for gamers and creators alike. It’s intuitive, visually appealing, and makes sharing gameplay moments incredibly easy. I love how seamless the editing tools are, and the community vibe is super positive. Overall, it’s a fun and powerful space to create and connect.
